nasb.text: And they all took hold of Sosthenes, the leader of the synagogue, and began beating him in front of the judgment seat. But Gallio was not concerned about any of these things.

esv.text: And they all seized Sosthenes, the ruler of the synagogue, and beat him in front of the tribunal. But Gallio paid no attention to any of this.

cnv.text: 眾人揪住會堂主管蘇提尼，在審判臺前打他。這些事迦流一概不理。

ccb.text: 到了庭外，众人揪住会堂主管所提尼，把他痛打一顿。迦流却置之不理。

csbs.text: 大家都抓住会堂主管索提尼，在审判台前殴打他。但伽利奥一概不管这些事。
